name: item

key_functions.obj_scene_update: Per-frame scene traversal — called from gfx_render_frame (main.c:143)
key_functions.obj_create_task: FSM task entry point — called 30+ times across menu/main/present/hud

summary: Object pool management, entity creation/destruction, and per-frame scene update. Manages two core pools (gObjectPool — 50 Objects, gPhysicsPool — 16 physics states), priority-sorted Object linked list, collision detection, and per-frame cleanup + callback execution. Used by every subsystem that creates game entities.

functions.name: pool_init
functions.summary: Initialize pool: allocates pointer array + element buffer via mem_alloc_debug, zeros buffer, fills elements array with offset pointers. Sets count and free stack index (x_b8173ab8 = count-1).

functions.name: pool_expand
functions.summary: Expand pool: allocates larger pointer array + new element buffer, copies existing pointers, frees old array. Used to grow object/task pools at runtime.

functions.name: pool_expand_both
functions.summary: Expand both gObjectPool and gTaskPool by count. Called from rsp_game_reinit.

functions.name: pool_init_core
functions.summary: Initialize core pools: 50 Objects in gObjectPool, 16 physics states in gPhysicsPool. Resets gObjectList and sObjectCount. Called from rsp_game_init.

functions.name: obj_alloc
functions.summary: Allocate Object from gObjectPool (pop from free stack). Inserts into priority-sorted linked list (head = gObjectList). Walk list to find correct insertion point based on obj->priority. Returns NULL if pool exhausted.

functions.name: obj_free
functions.summary: Free Object: remove from linked list (patch prev/next pointers). If has physics flag (x_3434f870), return physics state to gPhysicsPool and free transforms. Push Object back to gObjectPool free stack.

functions.name: batch_ident
functions.summary: Set GT batch transform to identity matrix. UNUSED (never called).

functions.name: batch_null_iter
functions.summary: Loop through batch vertices and triangles (no-op). UNUSED (never called).

functions.name: obj_collide_all
functions.summary: Collision detection: iterate all Objects, check collision mask (x_b1e624ba & x_e4466eca), compute 2D distance (x/z, ABS + lerped sum), call each Object's collision callback if overlapping.

functions.name: obj_scene_update
functions.summary: Per-frame scene update: iterate all Objects, run collision for objects with non-zero mask, clean up flagged objects (call finalizer, detach light, free tasks, return to pool), execute alive objects' callbacks, then render sorted objects (sort list → F3D SP display list or extra batch). Called from gfx_render_frame (main.c:143).

functions.name: obj_init
functions.summary: Initialize Object fields: attach transform to hierarchy, zero velocity/scale/rotation, set default color (160,160,160,128), allocate task from gTaskPool, set callback, build transform matrix from euler+position. NON_EQUIVALENT.

functions.name: obj_setup_transforms
functions.summary: Set up model transform hierarchy: allocates Transform array from KMD bone count, links each transform to parent (per KMD hierarchy data), sets translation from model's bone offsets.

functions.name: obj_create_anim
functions.summary: Create Object with animated model render: load .kmd resource, call obj_init + obj_setup_transforms, set up animation data. Sets callback to model_anim_render.

functions.name: obj_create_task
functions.summary: Create Object with FSM callback task: alloc + init, set callback to provided function, flags = x_f2c38774. Used as entry point for scene/task spawning (called 30+ times from menu/main/present/hud).

functions.name: obj_create_from_def
functions.summary: Create Object from definition table (x_f0d7e70f): loads resource data, sets flags/frameCounter/color. Called 50+ times from menu/hud/practice/select.

functions.name: obj_create_with_model
functions.summary: Create Object with model render + physics state: alloc physics from gPhysicsPool, load model resource, copy batch headers, set up transforms and animation. Sets callback to model_render.

functions.name: obj_create_from_props
functions.summary: Create Object from properties struct (x_8b39d614): wraps obj_create_with_model, sets frame render callback, configures sort/range bounds.

functions.name: obj_create_with_model_ptr
functions.summary: Create Object from pre-loaded Model* pointer (no resource load): alloc physics from gPhysicsPool, copy batch headers, set up transforms, load animation if present. Returns NULL if pool empty.

functions.name: obj_create_frame_render
functions.summary: Create Object with frame render + forced sort: wraps obj_create_with_model_ptr, sets callback to model_frame_render, configures frame-based sort priority.

globals.gObjectList: Head of priority-sorted Object linked list (used by item.c, match.c, cam_follow.c)
globals.sObjectCount: Active Object allocation counter (increment on alloc, decrement on free)
globals.gObjectPool: Object free-list pool (50 items, type x_b57dc591). Used by item.c, main.c, practice.c, menu, etc.
globals.gPhysicsPool: Physics/collision state pool (16 items of x_6fcfcf46). Used by model.c, move.c, player.c, trail.c, etc.

open_questions: obj_init is NON_EQUIVALENT — asm doesn't match C. Likely compiler quirk with the large struct initialization.
batch_ident / batch_null_iter — unused functions, probably left from development.
sItemUnused — BSS padding or leftover from cut feature.
